programme.desc: Dash, a broke and depressed 33-year-old man, is still in love with his ex, Lauren. It all seems hopeless until he meets Nora, a spontaneous and unforgettable woman. But timing is everything, and Noras not going to wait around. Starring Jay Baruchel, Jessica Pare, Jacob Tierney.

programme.title: Run This Town
programme.desc: A journalist and a political aide become entangled in a larger-than-life scandal. Starring Ben Platt, Mena Massoud, Nina Dobrev.

programme.title: Matthias and Maxime
programme.desc: Two young mens lifelong friendship is tested when they act in a movie whose script calls for them to kiss each other. Starring Gabriel DAlmeida Freitas, Xavier Dolan, Harris Dickinson.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus is trapped inside an abandoned building when she responds to an anonymous call for help; she learns the caller had a very different agenda.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: With Adam Worth under tight security back at the Sanctuary, Magnus discloses the turbulent beginnings he shares with The Five.

programme.title: The Games Maker
programme.desc: Ivans love of board games transports him into the competitive world of game invention. Starring Joseph Fiennes, Tom Cavanagh, Megan Charpentier.

programme.title: To the Arctic
programme.desc: With ice melting in their Arctic environment, a polar bear and her two cubs do what they can to adapt and survive.

programme.title: Blizzard
programme.desc: A youngster learns about true friendship with the help of a magically gifted reindeer from the North Pole. Starring Brenda Blethyn, Christopher Plummer, Kevin Pollak.

programme.title: Upside Down
programme.desc: Though it is forbidden, a man devises a way to reunite with a long-lost love from the twin world that sits just above his own. Starring Kirsten Dunst, Jim Sturgess, Timothy Spall.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: In order to save his home, an ogre along with a donkey makes a deal with a mean lord to rescue a beautiful princess. Starring Mike Myers, Eddie Murphy, Cameron Diaz.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: After returning from their honeymoon and showing home movies to their friends, Shrek and Fiona learn that her parents have heard that she has married her true love and wish to invite him to their kingdom, called Far Far Away. Starring Mike Myers, Eddie Murphy, Cameron Diaz.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: When the King falls ill, Shrek finds and trains an heir apparent while Princess Fiona fends off Prince Charmings advances. Starring Mike Myers, Eddie Murphy, Cameron Diaz.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: American boy Dre Parkers fighting skills are no match for Cheng, the school bully. He finds a friend in Mr. Han, a maintenance man who is also a martial-arts master. Mr. Han teaches Dre kung fu in the hope that Dre will be able to face down Cheng. Starring Jaden Smith, Jackie Chan, Taraji P. Henson.

In 1946, Branch Rickey (Harrison Ford), general manager of the Brooklyn Dodgers, signs Jackie Robinson (Chadwick Boseman) to the team in defiance of major league baseballs notorious color barrier. Starring Chadwick Boseman, Harrison Ford, Nicole Beharie.

programme.title: The Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: Bria expands the boundaries of the GFE in order to fulfill her needs.

programme.title: The Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: With an impending trial date, Ian attempts to rein Bria in by stepping up his surveillance.

programme.title: Minx
programme.desc: Shelly gets a taste of college life while joining Joyce on her victory-lap trip to Vassar; Doug accompanies Tina to her moms retirement party and learns some surprising news; Bambi connects with Richie on a trip of their own.

programme.title: Goon
programme.desc: Though a misfit among his brainy family members, Massachusetts bouncer Doug Glatt has a knockout punch that lands him a spot on a minor-league Canadian hockey team. Starring Seann William Scott, Jay Baruchel, Alison Pill.

programme.title: Goon: Last of the Enforcers
programme.desc: After one too many injuries, hockey player Doug Glatt leaves the game and becomes an insurance salesman at the urging of his pregnant wife. His retirement is short-lived as he laces up the skates once again to try and reclaim his former glory. Starring Seann William Scott, Liev Schreiber, Alison Pill.

programme.title: The Journals of Knud Rasmussen
programme.desc: European explorers change the lives of an Inuit community while exploring the Arctic in 1922. Starring Leah Angutimarik, Natar Ungalaaq, Peter-Henry Arnatsiaq.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Ignoring Magnuss warning, Will accepts Adam Worths offer to show them how to access the hidden city.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus and the team gear up for travel, hoping to find the gateway to the hidden city and Magnus father.

programme.title: Miltons Secret
programme.desc: A man (Donald Sutherland) teaches his 11-year-old grandson (William Ainscough) how to cope with bickering parents and the neighborhood bully. Starring Donald Sutherland, Michelle Rodriguez, Mia Kirshner.

programme.title: Free Willy
programme.desc: An abandoned boy (Jason James Richter) with a chip on his shoulder befriends an ill-fated killer whale at a water park. Starring Jason James Richter, Lori Petty, Jayne Atkinson.

programme.title: Free Willy 2: The Adventure Home
programme.desc: Whale pal Jesse copes with the existence of a cocky half-brother and the threat of a nearby oil spill. Starring Jason James Richter, August Schellenberg, Michael Madsen.

programme.title: Goose!
programme.desc: A boy (Max Morrow) conspires to save a talking gander from a man (Chevy Chase) who plans to cook the bird in an upcoming culinary contest. Starring Chevy Chase, Kari Matchett, Max Morrow.

programme.title: Mona Lisa Smile
programme.desc: In 1953 a professor (Julia Roberts) of art history challenges her female students (Kirsten Dunst, Julia Stiles) to re-examine the traditional roles of women. Starring Julia Roberts, Kirsten Dunst, Julia Stiles.

programme.title: We Are Marshall
programme.desc: Jack Lengyel, the new coach at West Virginias Marshall University, vows to rebuild the schools football program after a plane crash claims the lives of 75 players, staff and fans. Starring Matthew McConaughey, Matthew Fox, Ian McShane.

programme.title: The Color Purple
programme.desc: A black Southern woman (Whoopi Goldberg) struggles to find her identity after suffering years of abuse from her father and others over 40 years. Starring Whoopi Goldberg, Danny Glover, Margaret Avery.

programme.title: Django Unchained
programme.desc: A former slave (Jamie Foxx) joins forces with the German bounty hunter (Christoph Waltz) who freed him and helps hunt down the Souths most-wanted criminals, all in the hope of finding his long-lost wife (Kerry Washington). Starring Jamie Foxx, Christoph Waltz, Leonardo DiCaprio.

programme.title: The Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: Bria takes matters into her own hands in order to escape Ian.

programme.title: The Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: Bria must reckon with facing Donald head-on as the day of the trial arrives.

programme.title: Minx
programme.sub-title: God Closes a Door, Opens a Glory Hole
programme.desc: Constance, Joyce, and Tina head to a wilderness retreat to pick Minx International publishers; at Bottom Dollar, Richie has to replace a centerfold and scrambles to redo the new issue.

programme.title: The F Word
programme.desc: A medical-school dropout tries to hide his attraction to his new friend, a bubbly artist who already has a boyfriend. Starring Daniel Radcliffe, Zoe Kazan, Megan Park.

programme.title: Real Time
programme.desc: A killer gives a gambler an hour to live. Starring Randy Quaid, Jay Baruchel, Ella Chan.

programme.title: Perfect High
programme.desc: A teens (Bella Thorne) life spirals out of control when she starts abusing painkillers and heroin with her new friends (Israel Broussard, Daniela Bobadilla) from school. Starring Bella Thorne, Israel Broussard, Daniela Bobadilla.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Ranna tries to fulfill the laws that keep Praxis protected; Magnus figures out how the tremors and power fluctuations can be controlled.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Helen returns to find that the sanctuary has been trashed and members of the team have been attacking one another.

programme.title: Clara
programme.desc: In a race to find intelligent life in the universe, an astronomer and his freethinking research assistant make an inexplicable discovery that changes how they see the world -- and each other. Starring Patrick J. Adams, Troian Bellisario, Kristen Hager.

programme.title: Eve and the Fire Horse
programme.desc: A 9-year-old Chinese girl (Phoebe Jojo Kut) and her older sister (Hollie Lo) embrace their experiences at a Roman Catholic Sunday school. Starring Phoebe Jojo Kut, Hollie Lo, Vivian Wu.

programme.title: Clifford the Big Red Dog
programme.desc: A magical animal rescuer gives young Emily a little red puppy that quickly grows into a 10-foot hound. With her single mother away on business, Emily and her fun but impulsive uncle set out on an adventure that takes a bite out of the Big Apple. Starring Darby Camp, Jack Whitehall, Tony Hale.

programme.title: Racetime
programme.desc: After losing a rigged sled race, Frankie challenges newcomer Zac to one last showdown. With the stakes higher than ever, Zac will stop at nothing to win the race. Starring Lucinda Davis, Noel Fisher, Angela Galuppo.

programme.title: Kayak to Klemtu
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl readies for a kayak trip along the shores of the Great Bear rainforest with her family to protest oil tanker traffic. Starring Evan Adams, Jared Ager-Foster, Carmel Amit.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Members of the mysterious and spooky Addams Family -- Gomez, Morticia, Pugsley, Wednesday, Uncle Fester and Grandma -- encounter a shady TV personality who despises their eerie hilltop mansion. Starring Oscar Isaac, Charlize Theron, Chloë Grace Moretz.

programme.title: The Addams Family 2
programme.desc: Hoping to get closer as a family, Gomez, Morticia and the rest of the Addams clan embark on an adventurous road trip in a hideous and humongous camper. Starring Oscar Isaac, Charlize Theron, Chloë Grace Moretz.

programme.title: The Day After Tomorrow
programme.desc: When a new global ice-age threatens the world, a climatologist tries to figure out a way to save humanity, and attempts to get to his young son in New York. Starring Dennis Quaid, Jake Gyllenhaal, Ian Holm.

programme.title: Eraserhead
programme.desc: When Henry discovers that a fling with Mary X leaves her pregnant, he marries the expectant mother and has her move in with him. Things take a strange turn when the couples baby turns out to be a bizarre lizard-like creature that wont stop wailing. Starring Jack Nance, Charlotte Stewart, Allen Joseph.

programme.title: Christiane F
programme.desc: In the 1970s Berlin, an aimless teenager who lives with her single mother falls in with a drug dealer. Starring Thomas Haustein, Natja Brunckhorst, Jens Kuphal.

programme.title: The Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: Bria must take matters into her own hands as she avoids both the law and Donald.

programme.title: Minx
programme.desc: At the Minx International launch party, Doug confronts Constance, while Joyce starts to lose control of her magazine; Shelly and Lenny look toward an uncertain future.

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: While searching for hidden drugs, Frank throws his back out; Jackie finds a new hiding place; Grace calls out Jackie on her lying prowess; Zoey confronts Prentiss about his dissatisfaction; Mia and Kevin have an announcement.

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: Jackies fake identity is compromised; Frank moves in; Antoinette badgers Jackie about her sobriety; Prentiss plans a night out with Zoey.

programme.title: South Pacific
programme.desc: Navy nurse Nellie (Mitzi Gaynor) falls for plantation-owner Emile (Rossano Brazzi), who accepts a top-secret World War II mission. Starring Mitzi Gaynor, Rossano Brazzi, John Kerr.

programme.title: Lassie Come Home
programme.desc: An English boys (Roddy McDowall) collie finds her way back home from Scotland after his father (Donald Crisp) sells her to a duke. Starring Roddy McDowall, Donald Crisp, Dame May Whitty.

programme.title: Come Back, Little Sheba
programme.desc: A housewife (Shirley Booth) and her alcoholic husband (Burt Lancaster) rent a spare room to a pretty student (Terry Moore). Starring Burt Lancaster, Shirley Booth, Terry Moore.

programme.title: The Awful Truth
programme.desc: Spouses (Irene Dunne, Cary Grant) try to spoil each others chances for romance before their divorce becomes final in 90 days. Starring Irene Dunne, Cary Grant, Ralph Bellamy.

programme.title: Umberto D
programme.desc: A lonely old man struggles to maintain his dignity while leading a meager existence with his dog as his only companion. Starring Carlo Battisti, Maria-Pia Casilio, Lina Gennari.

programme.title: Sounder
programme.desc: A sharecroppers (Paul Winfield) wife (Cicely Tyson) keeps the family together after he goes to prison in 1930s Louisiana. Starring Cicely Tyson, Paul Winfield, Kevin Hooks.

programme.title: Disraeli
programme.desc: The prime minister of Great Britain makes a decision to purchase the Suez Canal despite opposing pressures. Starring George Arliss, Joan Bennett, Anthony Bushell.

programme.title: Viva Villa!
programme.desc: Mexican bandit Pancho Villa (Wallace Beery) and his gang join the peasant army in revolution. Starring Wallace Beery, Leo Carrillo, Fay Wray.

programme.title: Rasputin and the Empress
programme.desc: A prince (John Barrymore) plots to kill mad monk Rasputin (Lionel Barrymore) for the good of the czar, the czarina (Ethel Barrymore) and Russia. Starring John Barrymore, Ethel Barrymore, Lionel Barrymore.

programme.title: The Private Life of Henry VIII
programme.desc: Laughton won an Oscar for his portrayal of the 16th-century English monarch in Alexander Kordas biographical account. Starring Charles Laughton, Elsa Lanchester, Binnie Barnes.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: The 18th-century Austrian princess (Norma Shearer) has an affair with a Swedish count (Tyrone Power) and becomes queen of France. Starring Norma Shearer, Tyrone Power, John Barrymore.

programme.title: Julius Caesar
programme.desc: Shakespeares Brutus (James Mason), Cassius (John Gielgud) and others plot the Roman rulers death, but Mark Antony (Marlon Brando) avenges it. Starring Marlon Brando, James Mason, John Gielgud.

programme.title: Sunrise at Campobello
programme.desc: Franklin Delano Roosevelt (Ralph Bellamy) fights polio and enters politics with his wife, Eleanor (Greer Garson). Starring Ralph Bellamy, Greer Garson, Hume Cronyn.

programme.title: Gaslight
programme.desc: A Scotland Yard detective (Joseph Cotten) figures out why a schizoid Victorian (Charles Boyer) is trying to drive his wife (Ingrid Bergman) mad. Starring Charles Boyer, Ingrid Bergman, Joseph Cotten.

programme.title: Imitation of Life
programme.desc: An aspiring actress and her black housekeeper retain a solid friendship despite problems with their teenage daughters. Starring Lana Turner, John Gavin, Sandra Dee.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: A man in black (Yul Brynner) recruits six hired guns to lead Mexican villagers against the gang of an outlaw (Eli Wallach). Starring Yul Brynner, Eli Wallach, Steve McQueen.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: A boozing rock stars (Kris Kristofferson) career falls as fast as his unknown lovers (Barbra Streisand) begins to rise. Starring Barbra Streisand, Kris Kristofferson, Gary Busey.

programme.title: Show Boat
programme.desc: The captains daughter (Kathryn Grayson) marries a gambler (Howard Keel) who turns performer on a Mississippi riverboat. Starring Kathryn Grayson, Howard Keel, Ava Gardner.

programme.title: The Merry Widow
programme.desc: The king of bankrupt Marshovia orders a playboy count (Fernando Lamas) to woo a rich widow (Lana Turner) in Paris. Starring Lana Turner, Fernando Lamas, Una Merkel.

programme.title: Cimarron
programme.desc: Husband-and-wife homesteaders (Glenn Ford, Maria Schell) spend 25 years in Oklahoma after the great land rush of 1889. Starring Glenn Ford, Maria Schell, Anne Baxter.

programme.title: The Sea Hawk
programme.desc: A British privateer (Errol Flynn) raids Spanish ships with his queens (Flora Robson) permission in 1585. Starring Errol Flynn, Brenda Marshall, Flora Robson.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Based on the story by Louisa May Alcott. The four March sisters forge unbreakable emotional ties during the Civil War. Starring June Allyson, Peter Lawford, Elizabeth Taylor.

programme.title: Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde
programme.desc: Gentle Dr. Jekyll (Spencer Tracy) tests a serum on himself, releasing vicious alter-ego Mr. Hyde on 19th-century London. Prowling the town, Hyde ventures to a music hall and encounters Ivy (Ingrid Bergman), whom he takes forcibly as his mistress. Starring Spencer Tracy, Ingrid Bergman, Lana Turner.

programme.title: Waterloo Bridge
programme.desc: A ballet dancer (Vivien Leigh) and a British officer (Robert Taylor) cross stars on the eve of World War I. Starring Vivien Leigh, Robert Taylor, Lucile Watson.

programme.title: Going My Way
programme.desc: Singing Father OMalley (Bing Crosby) bails out crusty Father Fitzgibbons (Barry Fitzgerald) financially strapped parish. Starring Bing Crosby, Barry Fitzgerald, Rise Stevens.

programme.title: Elmer Gantry
programme.desc: An Oscar-winning adaptation of the Sinclair Lewis novel about religious fervor in small-town America. Starring Burt Lancaster, Jean Simmons, Dean Jagger.

programme.title: A Man for All Seasons
programme.desc: Sir Thomas More (Paul Scofield) opposes Henry VIIIs (Robert Shaw) appointing himself head of the Church of England. Starring Paul Scofield, Robert Shaw, Orson Welles.

programme.title: The Shoes of the Fisherman
programme.desc: A Ukrainian bishop (Anthony Quinn) and former Siberian prisoner is sent to Rome, made cardinal and elected pope. Starring Anthony Quinn, Laurence Olivier, Oskar Werner.

programme.title: Hallelujah
programme.desc: A cotton picker (Daniel L. Haynes) turns preacher and meets a Tennessee temptress (Nina Mae McKinney) and her man (William Fountaine). Starring Daniel L. Haynes, Nina Mae McKinney, William Fountaine.

programme.title: One Foot in Heaven
programme.desc: A Methodist minister (Fredric March) and his wife (Martha Scott) raise a family through years of challenge in small-town parishes. Starring Fredric March, Martha Scott, Beulah Bondi.

programme.title: Black Fury
programme.desc: A simple Pennsylvania coal miner is drawn into the violent conflict between union workers and management. Starring Paul Muni, Karen Morley, William Gargan.

programme.title: The Organizer
programme.desc: A political refugee visiting an Italian friend in 19th-century Turin leads a strike and helps form a labor union. Starring Marcello Mastroianni, Renato Salvatori, Gabriella Giorgelli.

programme.desc: A steel tycoons (Donald Crisp) son (Gregory Peck) loves the family maid, an Irish steelworkers daughter (Greer Garson), in late-1800s Pittsburgh. Starring Greer Garson, Gregory Peck, Donald Crisp.

programme.title: Harlan County, U.S.A.
programme.desc: Filmmaker Barbara Kopple documents Kentucky coal miners facing brutal opposition during a 1973 strike.

programme.title: On the Waterfront
programme.desc: A conscience-stricken ex-boxer (Marlon Brando) stands up to a corrupt union boss after unwittingly participating in a fellow longshoremans murder. Starring Marlon Brando, Eva Marie Saint, Karl Malden.

programme.title: Roman Holiday
programme.desc: A young princess (Audrey Hepburn), tired of her constraints, runs off with a U.S. newsman (Gregory Peck) in Rome. Starring Gregory Peck, Audrey Hepburn, Eddie Albert.

programme.desc: An English miss (Helena Bonham-Carter) tours 1907 Florence, Italy, with her cousin (Maggie Smith) and meets a soulmate (Julian Sands). Starring Helena Bonham Carter, Maggie Smith, Julian Sands.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The Sweet Life
programme.desc: Bernie circumvents his low-cholesterol diet by sneaking over to a neighbors (guest star Don Rickles) place.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Sin Cup
programme.desc: Bernie and Wanda worry about Jordans religious faith after he defaces a picture of Jesus.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Steves Gotta Have It
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) books a romantic evening with Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson) on the same night of the Big Brother of the Year banquet.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - When the Funk Hits the Rib Tips
programme.desc: Steve battles with his former group to become the house act at a local nightclub.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Im Not a Chauvinist, Piggy
programme.desc: Reginas (Wendy Raquel Robinson) televised battle with a chicken mascot at a basketball game tests Steves (Steve Harvey) manliness.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Big Daddy Meets the Man of Steele
programme.desc: When an ex-boyfriend of Reginas (Wendy Raquel Robinson) comes into town, Steve (Steve Harvey) gets a date to make Regina jealous. Guest star: Adele Givens.

programme.title: My Other Mother
programme.desc: Adopted as a child, an anchorwoman (Essence Atkins) reconnects with her birth mother (Lynn Whitfield) and extended family when she attends the funeral of her father.

programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.desc: Every five seconds theres a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert, restore identity, and reimburse lost funds-leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Cindy Crawford talks about the latest breakthroughs in skincare
programme.desc: Join Cindy Crawford as she talks to real customers about the breakthrough skincare system that keeps them looking their best. Take a trip to the stunning French countryside to see the rare French melon that defies the aging process.

programme.title: Protect Your Family from Identity Theft
programme.desc: Every five seconds theres a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert, restore identity, and reimburse lost funds-leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.title: Protect Your Family from Identity Theft
programme.desc: Every five seconds theres a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert, restore identity, and reimburse lost funds-leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - Girlhood 101
programme.desc: Celebrate all aspects of girlhood from school to friendships.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - My Heart Is in This Chicken Dinner
programme.desc: Yo-Yo cooks up bone-in, skin-on chicken thighs that are seasoned with Curry and coconut milk; she serves it with wild rice with onions, garlic, almonds, and jalapenos; she brings it on home with her version of a spagliato.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - Small Bites and Kicked Up Cocktails
programme.desc: Yo-Yo lays out small bites that are packed with flavor; the menu is stuffed portobello mushrooms, BLT skewers with scallops and pesto, and the cocktail of the day is a blood orange Margarita.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - Simple and Delicious
programme.desc: Yo-Yo kicks things off with a penne pasta with spicy Italian sausage and a garlic tomato sauce; she shows off her skills with her version of fried rice, complete with eggs shrimp and more.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - Ladies First
programme.desc: For ladies night, YoYo makes buttery and delicious lobster rolls and doesnt skimp on the meat; she then takes it up a notch with a pan-seared salmon, drizzled with a creamy pesto sauce, served with a side of sauteed broccolini.

programme.title: Love Will Find a Way
programme.desc: Reggies search for love continues in Paris with Troy and Piper.

programme.title: The Love Letter
programme.desc: An advice columnist (Keshia Knight Pulliam) uncovers her true feelings after writing an anonymous letter to herself.

programme.title: Family Time - No Lie Zone
programme.desc: Tony and Lisa ban all lying in the household, including the little white lies that hold the family together.

programme.title: Family Time - Lisas Leftovers
programme.desc: Lisa gets upset when her sister Lori begins dating her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Family Time - Powering Down
programme.desc: Tony feels his family is drifting apart so he bans technology in the household.

programme.title: Family Time - The Oops Baby
programme.desc: Tony and Lisa must deal with the possibility of a new baby.

programme.title: Family Time - Cut It Out
programme.desc: Tony spends time in the local barbershop with friends; Lori considers her options for having a baby.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Stone Nuts
programme.desc: Jordan tries to fit in with the popular crowd; after taking Bernies advice, he winds up losing his lunch money in a poker game.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Jack And Jacqueline
programme.desc: Wanda urges Vanessa to join an enrichment organization she once belonged to; they learn times have changed when Vanessa and her new friends are charged with shoplifting.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Manchild in Vanessa Land
programme.desc: Bernie learns Vanessa has a boyfriend, Rahim, who is 18 years old; when he discovers that the teen has a child, he hits the ceiling.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - You Dont Know Squad
programme.desc: Vanessa tries to increase her chances of being accepted into a college by joining the drill team, which pleases Bernie until he sees one of the squads provocative routines.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - You Got Served
programme.desc: Bernie is sued for being a negligent parent after a birthday bash for Bryana results in broken bones.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Youre Driving Me Crazy
programme.desc: Regina and Warringtons (Wendy Raquel Robinson, guest star Dorien Wilson) spat leaves Steve and Cedric (Steve Harvey, Cedric The Entertainer) out in the cold.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Dancing Fools
programme.desc: Regina and Cedric (Wendy Raquel Robinson, Cedric The Entertainer) battle Lovita and Steve (Terri J. Vaughn, Steve Harvey) in a dance competition; Romeo (Merlin Santana) tries to get good grades.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Breakfast With Tiffany
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) is recruited to help raise the spirits of Reginas (Wendy Raquel Robinson) newly separated friend Tiffany (guest star Jackie Mari Roberts).

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Papas Got a Brand New Bag
programme.desc: An insurance policy makes Steve (Steve Harvey) suspicious of his fathers (guest star Richard Gant) new young fiancee (guest star Jaqueline Fleming).

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - Dont Push Me
programme.desc: Everyone has a line that shouldnt be crossed.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - Finding Your Voice
programme.desc: Learning the importance of knowing when to speak up.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - Another Year Older
programme.desc: Growing up is hard.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - Accepting Me
programme.desc: Self-love is the first step in finding self-acceptance.

programme.desc: Students, their parents and faculty face an uphill battle as they try to prevent their beloved school from closing due to budget cuts.

programme.desc: Chef teaches viewers how to remake world-famous dishes and cocktails with a twist using local ingredients.

programme.title: Twisted Dish - The Chicken Sandwich War is Over!
programme.desc: Chef teaches viewers how to remake world-famous dishes and cocktails with a twist using local ingredients.

programme.title: Twisted Dish - Spaghetti And Meatballs All Flavor And Friendly
programme.desc: Chef teaches viewers how to remake world-famous dishes and cocktails with a twist using local ingredients.

programme.title: Twisted Dish - Crowned and Crusted Flavor!
programme.desc: Chef teaches viewers how to remake world-famous dishes and cocktails with a twist using local ingredients.

programme.title: Love Will Keep Us Together
programme.desc: Best friends begin to have doubts about their fiances.

programme.title: Life of a King
programme.desc: Determined to help at-risk youths avoid the mistakes he made, an ex-con (Cuba Gooding Jr.) forms a chess club to offer them an alternative to running with street gangs.

programme.title: Family Time - There Goes the Neighborhood
programme.desc: Anthony, a construction worker, wins $500,000 in the lottery, enabling him to move his family to a middle-class neighborhood.

programme.title: Family Time - No Happy Ending
programme.desc: With the kids spending a few days at the grandparents house, Anthony and Lisa plan a romantic weekend at home.

programme.title: Family Time - The Note
programme.desc: Devin turns into a ladies man after taking advice from Anthony.

programme.title: Family Time - The Tennis Bracelet
programme.desc: After Anthony purchases a diamond tennis bracelet for his mothers 65th birthday, him and Lisa argue about who he loves more.

programme.title: Family Time - When a Womans Fed Up
programme.desc: After being neglectful and spending too much time in his man cave, Anthony worries that Lisa might stray from the marriage.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - I Dont Wanna Be a Playa No More
programme.desc: When Jordan develops a crush on a girl at school, Bernie takes it upon himself to teach Jordan how to be a player and get the girl.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The Big Picture
programme.desc: Jordans prank anonymous phone calls have surprising consequences.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The Music Mac
programme.desc: When Vanessa surprises everyone with her musical talent, Isaac Hayes offers Bernie advice on how to nurture it.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Walk Like a Man
programme.desc: Bernie sees children walking to school on their own and decides it is time for Jordan to do the same, despite Wandas objections.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Father Knows Best
programme.desc: When a man arrives from Chicago claiming to be Bryanas father, Bernie is cautiously supportive.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Just My Imagination
programme.desc: Steve and Romeo fight for the same womans attention; Cedric and Lovita question their compatibility.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Maid to Order
programme.desc: Hiring a maid (Esther Scott) leads to even more work for Steve, Cedric and Regina (Steve Harvey, Cedric The Entertainer, Wendy Raquel Robinson).

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Ice Station Piggy
programme.desc: A snowstorm causes Steve and Reginas relationship to heat up; Lovitas cousin is attracted to Cedric.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - White Men Can Funk
programme.desc: A replacement singer (guest star Adrian Zmed) shocks Steves (Steve Harvey) band, the Hi-Tops, with his talented vocals.

programme.title: The Harlem Globetrotters: Secrets of the City - Mexico City
programme.desc: Join the Harlem Globetrotters on a whirlwind adventure through Mexico City! They dive into ancient tales by gliding along historic canals and soaring over majestic pyramids. Next, they feast like royals in a one-of-a-kind cave restaurant.

programme.title: The Harlem Globetrotters: Secrets of the City - Stuttgart; Sydney
programme.desc: In Stuttgart, Germany, join the spring festival in traditional German attire and connect with the local Black expat community; Bulldog and Wham travel to Sydney, Australia, where they dive into the world of traditional Aussie sports.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Boy Trouble
programme.desc: A sexist school board member ignores Reginas funding proposal while green-lighting Steves harebrained ideas.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Guess Whos Not Coming to Counseling
programme.desc: Steve poses as Lovitas fiance when Cedric cant attend a counseling session with a renowned minister.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Moonlighting
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) gets evicted from his apartment; Regina falls for an author who has a strange fetish.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Dont Stand Too Close to Me
programme.desc: Steve leads Reginas teen-feminist discussion group; Cedric and Lovita socialize with another couple.

programme.title: The Harlem Globetrotters: Secrets of the City - Mexico City
programme.desc: Join the Harlem Globetrotters on a whirlwind adventure through Mexico City! They dive into ancient tales by gliding along historic canals and soaring over majestic pyramids. Next, they feast like royals in a one-of-a-kind cave restaurant.

programme.sub-title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull (2008)
programme.desc: Indy (Harrison Ford) and a young adventurer (Shia La Beouf) must ferret out a powerful artifact and keep it out of the hands of a deadly Soviet agent (Cate Blanchett).

programme.title: The Heartbreak Kid (2007)
programme.desc: After his new bride reveals her nasty nature, a man (Ben Stiller) meets the woman (Michelle Monaghan) who may be his real soul mate and tries to woo her.

programme.title: American Gigolo (1980)
programme.desc: A professional Beverly Hills escort falls in love with a big shots wife and winds up framed for murder.

programme.title: Sexterior Motives (2025)
programme.desc: Aurora is a femme fatale who finds herself in a twisted tale of passion and betrayal. Driven by lust, Jessica and Tony attempt to ruin Auroras husband but when Auroras lover, Connie, thwarts their plan, all chaos ensues..

programme.title: The Painter (2024)
programme.desc: An ex-CIA operative is tracked down by a young woman and they become entangled in an unauthorized black ops program.

programme.title: Disgraced (2017)
programme.desc: An examination of the events surrounding the 2003 murder of Baylor University mens basketball star Patrick Dennehy.

programme.title: McEnroe (2022)
programme.desc: John McEnroe finally tells his side of his storied career and performances on the court.

programme.title: Freedoms Path (2022)
programme.desc: When Union soldier William runs from battle, hes taken to safety by a heroic young Black man. Kitch is part of a secret community of freed slaves running a section of the Underground Railroad, but a desperate slave catcher is on their trail.

programme.title: We Were Soldiers (2002)
programme.desc: A lieutenant colonel and approximately 400 U.S. troops battle 2,000 North Vietnamese soldiers in 1965.

programme.title: Before Dawn (2024)
programme.desc: A young man joins his countrymen on the Western front of World War I, hoping to expedite an end to the bloody conflict. However, as the battle rages on, hes forced to grapple with the brutal realities of trench warfare.

programme.title: Event Horizon (1997)
programme.desc: A spaceship missing for seven years finally re-emerges and sends out a distress signal. But when a team is sent out to investigate, they discover that something sinister has taken over the craft.

programme.title: Black Lotus (2023)
programme.desc: A soldier uses his military training to rescue the kidnapped daughter of his dead friend.

programme.title: Shell (2024)
programme.desc: Desperate to reclaim her career, once-beloved actress Samantha Lake gets drawn into the glamorous world of wellness mogul Zoe Shannon, only to uncover a monstrous truth beneath the seemingly flawless surface.

programme.title: Queen Bees (2021)
programme.desc: While her house undergoes repairs, fiercely independent senior Helen temporarily moves into a nearby retirement community, where she encounters lusty widows, cutthroat bridge tournaments and a hotbed of bullying "mean girls."

programme.title: The First Wives Club (1996)
programme.desc: Three 50-ish college friends (Goldie Hawn, Bette Midler, Diane Keaton) plot revenge after their husbands dump them for younger women.

programme.title: Bridget Joness Baby (2016)
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones (Renee Zellweger) must figure out which of the two men (Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey) in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: The Reader (2008)
programme.desc: In postwar Germany, a teenager (David Kross) has a love affair with an older woman (Kate Winslet) who is hiding a terrible secret.

programme.title: Revolutionary Road (2008)
programme.desc: In 1950s Connecticut, two suburbanites (Leonardo DiCaprio, Kate Winslet) become increasingly dissatisfied with their marriage and societys expectations of conformity.

programme.title: Superstar (1999)
programme.desc: An energetic schoolgirl (Molly Shannon) hopes to win a talent contest where a prize as a movie extra might lead to her first kiss.

programme.title: The Prince and Me (2004)
programme.desc: Paige, a premedical student, falls in love with Eddie, a Danish prince, who keeps his identity a secret.

programme.title: About Adam (2000)
programme.desc: A magnetic young man (Stuart Townsend) meets and romances an Irish waitress (Kate Hudson), then courts and beds the rest of the family.

programme.title: I Used to Go Here (2020)
programme.desc: A successful author finds herself deeply enmeshed in the lives of a group of college students after being asked to speak at her alma mater.

programme.title: End of Sentence (2019)
programme.desc: After being released from prison, a young man reluctantly embarks on a journey with his estranged father to spread his mothers ashes in her native Ireland.

programme.title: Ashby (2015)
programme.desc: After moving to a new town with his single mother (Sarah Silverman), a teen (Nat Wolff) befriends a retired CIA assassin (Mickey Rourke) who teaches him valuable life lessons.

programme.title: Kate and Leopold (2001)
programme.desc: A Manhattan woman (Meg Ryan) falls in love with the 19th-century Duke of Albany (Hugh Jackman) who has stepped through a time portal.

programme.title: Runaway Bride (1999)
programme.desc: A New York reporter (Richard Gere) travels to Maryland to profile a woman (Julia Roberts) who left three bridegrooms at the altar.

programme.title: Flashdance (1983)
programme.desc: A Pittsburgh welder works days, dances in a bar at night, dates her boss and chases the dream of acceptance into a prestigious ballet school.

programme.title: Save the Last Dance (2001)
programme.desc: A white teenager (Julia Stiles) moves to Chicago after her mothers death and falls for a black student (Sean Patrick Thomas) who shares her love of dance.

programme.title: Persona (2024)
programme.desc: Two injured women find themselves trapped inside a secluded home with no memory of how they got there. Scared, confused, and distrustful of each other, they must figure out a way to escape before their captor comes back for them.

programme.title: Run (2025)
programme.desc: Smugglers, the police, locals and tourists get drawn into a dangerous web of survival, sacrifice and shifting loyalties as Europe faces a surge in migration.

programme.title: Four Letters of Love (2024)
programme.desc: Nicholas and Isabel are made for each other, but as destiny pulls them together, family, passion and faith drives them apart. As they embark on journeys of heartache and misplaced love, fate soon contrives to pull the threads of their lives together.

programme.title: I Used to Go Here (2020)
programme.desc: A successful author finds herself deeply enmeshed in the lives of a group of college students after being asked to speak at her alma mater.

programme.title: Breakfast at Tiffanys (1961)
programme.desc: New York playgirl Holly Golightly (Audrey Hepburn) puzzles a writer (George Peppard) who lives in her building.

programme.title: Double Jeopardy (1999)
programme.desc: While in jail for murdering her husband (Bruce Greenwood), a woman (Ashley Judd) discovers he is living under a new identity with their son.

programme.title: Regarding Us (2025)
programme.desc: After losing her teaching career, A transgender woman has a profound impact on the lives of two children.

programme.title: Last Weekend (2014)
programme.desc: Petty squabbling marks the Memorial Day reunion of an affluent matriarch (Patricia Clarkson) and her dysfunctional family (Chris Mulkey, Zachary Booth).

programme.title: Cold Mountain (2003)
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a wounded Confederate soldier (Jude Law) abandons his duties to make his way home to his sweetheart (Nicole Kidman).

programme.title: The Hours (2002)
programme.desc: The writings of Virginia Woolf (Nicole Kidman) affect a housewife (Julianne Moore) and emulate the life of a New Yorker (Meryl Streep) who is in love with a dying poet.

programme.title: Losing Isaiah (1995)
programme.desc: An ex-crack addict (Halle Berry) fights for custody of her son adopted by a social worker (Jessica Lange) and her husband (David Strathairn).

programme.title: Like Water for Chocolate (1992)
programme.desc: The youngest daughter (Lumi Cavazos) of a Mexican family expresses her feelings in preparing wonderful food, when tradition keeps her from marrying her true love (Marco Leonardi).

programme.title: Frida (2002)
programme.desc: Mexican painter Frida Kahlo (Salma Hayek) marries fellow artist Diego Rivera who shares her radical political views.

programme.title: The Talented Mr. Ripley (1999)
programme.desc: A young man (Matt Damon) travels to 1950s Italy and begins to assume the identity of a playboy (Jude Law) he was hired to bring back to the United States.

programme.title: The Edge of Seventeen (2016)
programme.desc: A high school junior (Hailee Steinfeld) develops an unexpected bond with a thoughtful teen (Hayden Szeto) after learning that her best friend (Haley Lu Richardson) is dating her older brother (Blake Jenner).

programme.title: Mothers Day (2016)
programme.desc: As Mothers Day draws near, a single mom (Jennifer Aniston) learns that her ex-husband (Timothy Olyphant) is marrying a younger woman (Shay Mitchell), while a recently widowed man (Jason Sudeikis) struggles to raise his two daughters.

programme.title: Til Death Do Us Part (2017)
programme.desc: Madison Roland finds love with another man after she leaves her abusive husband, Michael, and changes her identity. All seems well, until Michael discovers Madisons whereabouts and re-creates her nightmare all over again.

programme.title: Seaside (2018)
programme.desc: A woman decides to run away to the Oregon coast with her boyfriend when he inherits a family beach house.

programme.title: Jennys Wedding (2015)
programme.desc: When Jenny (Katherine Heigl) decides to marry a woman (Alexis Bledel), her conventional family must accept who she is or risk losing her forever.

programme.title: The Argument (2020)
programme.desc: When a couple argue about a party and neither will back down, they decide to re-create the evening to determine who is right.

programme.title: Winter Spring Summer or Fall (2024)
programme.desc: Young Remi has her future figured out, until she meets Barnes, who lives for the moment and makes her question everything. As their love story unfolds, she faces a choice -- stick to her plan or risk it all for a life she never saw coming.

programme.title: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button (2008)
programme.sub-title: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button (2008)
programme.desc: Benjamin Button (Brad Pitt) is born an old man in 1918 New Orleans and ages in reverse and, in so doing, becomes intimately familiar with the natures of love and death.

programme.title: Our Friend (2019)
programme.desc: After Nicole and Matthew receive life-altering news, the couple find unexpected support from their friend Dane, who puts his own life on hold to move into their family home.

programme.title: Lisa Roper Outdoors
programme.desc: Welcome to Lisa Roper Outdoors, where every episode is a journey into the heart of outdoor adventure. From breathtaking landscapes to mouthwatering shore lunches, Lisa Roper brings you along as she connects with nature in a way that stirs the soul.
